prompt: Design a three-course menu for a rainy Sunday lunch for two people who have known each other a long time. Dishes only — no explanation.
response:
Appetizer: Tomato Salad with Fresh Basil & Burrata Cheese.
Main Course: Braised Lamb Shanks with Garlic Mashed Potatoes and Roasted Root Vegetables.
Dessert: Dark Chocolate Lava Cake with Vanilla Ice Cream & Fresh Berries.
